description: Copying React hook mental model into Vue
body:
Adding hook-like watcher chains or dependency-array reasoning can make Vue code harder and wrong. Treat as a do-not-use signal when computed/event flow would solve derived state. Safer path: follow Vue refs, computed, watch, and lifecycle semantics.

Use only as a diagnostic do-not-use signal; do not expose this as positive strategy, methodology, knowledge, skill, or memory.
